name: Alibaba Cloud Hologres MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Alibaba Cloud (aliyun org) for Hologres — Alibaba's cloud-native real-time interactive analytics database. Hologres is PostgreSQL-compatible with HTAP (Hybrid Transactional/Analytical Processing) capabilities. Enables AI agents to query and manage Hologres data warehouses through Alibaba Cloud's database service.
use_cases: Querying Hologres real-time analytics data from reporting agents
Managing Hologres schema and data operations from data engineering agents
Running analytical SQL queries on Hologres for business intelligence agents
Integrating Hologres HTAP capabilities into AI-driven data workflows
not_for: Teams not using Alibaba Cloud Hologres
Teams using PostgreSQL without Hologres (use PostgreSQL MCP instead)
best_when: An enterprise data team on Alibaba Cloud using Hologres for real-time analytics wants AI agents to query and manage their Hologres data warehouse.
avoid_when: You use other data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift). Also: Hologres is primarily Alibaba Cloud — data residency in CN/AP regions.

auth.notes: Hologres connection credentials (AccessKey + endpoint) required. Uses Alibaba Cloud RAM for access control.

pricing.free_tier_limits: None — Hologres is a paid cloud service
pricing.paid_tiers: Hologres pricing by compute units and storage
pricing.notes: Hologres is a paid Alibaba Cloud service. MCP server is free open source from aliyun org.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by Hologres compute tier and query complexity

known_agent_gotchas: Documentation primarily in Chinese — international users may face translation challenges
Hologres is PostgreSQL-compatible but has specific extensions — test SQL compatibility
Data residency primarily in Alibaba Cloud CN/AP regions — review for compliance
Official from aliyun org — quality implementation from Alibaba's cloud team
agent_readiness.security_notes: Official Alibaba Cloud MCP. HTTPS to Hologres. Alibaba Cloud RAM for access control. Data in Alibaba Cloud regions. ISO27001/SOC2 compliant.

security_score_components.security_notes: Official Alibaba Cloud. HTTPS. RAM access control. CN/AP data residency. ISO27001/SOC2.
